would otherwise be paid under IPPS. 

The dollar amount of the reduction is in the HAC Reduction Payment Amount field 
(HAC_RDCTN_PMT_AMT; in 2014 it was referred to as the IPPS_FLEX_PYMT_6_AMT). 

This field is new in October 2014. It is not populated (through 2018). This field only applies to 
Inpatient/SNF claims.
